dataflows.name: aws_load_delta__schema_evolve_base
dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: initial write with base columns only

dataflows.name: aws_load_delta__schema_evolve_new_cols
dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: append with additional columns triggers merge schema

additional_columns.expression: CASE WHEN CAST(amount AS DOUBLE) > 100 THEN 'high' ELSE 'low' END

dataflows.name: aws_read_delta__schema_evolve
dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: read back the evolved table

dataflows.name: aws_load_delta__schema_evolve_fewer_cols
dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: append with fewer columns than dest (missing order_year, amount_category filled with null)

dataflows.name: aws_read_delta__schema_evolve_fewer_cols
dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: read back after fewer-column append to verify nulls

source.query: SELECT order_id, order_date, amount FROM orders WHERE amount > 100
SELECT order_id, amount, region FROM orders_appended WHERE region = 'US-East'

dataflows.name: aws_load_iceberg__append_partitioned
dataflows.description: Iceberg append with year partition column

dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: initial write with base columns only

dataflows.name: aws_load_iceberg__schema_evolve_new_cols
dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: append with additional columns triggers evolve

additional_columns.expression: CASE WHEN CAST(amount AS DOUBLE) > 100 THEN 'high' ELSE 'low' END

dataflows.name: aws_read_iceberg__schema_evolve
dataflows.description: Schema evolution test: read back the evolved table

dataflows.name: aws_load_iceberg__schema_evolve_fewer_cols
